subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord from this praiseworthy station. Blessed is he who hath heard the call from this direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمود اسمع ندآء ربک من هذا المقام المحمود طوبی لمن سمع الندا من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
